Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp

Interface McpResourceHandler

Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface McpResourceHandler
Handler for a single MCP resource.

Implementations declare a descriptor (the Resource returned by resources/list) and a read body invoked when the matching resources/read method runs.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Resource
    descriptor()
    Returns the static descriptor for this resource.
    ReadResourceResult
    read(String uri, BeanStore ctx)
    Reads the resource body.

  • Method Details

    • descriptor

      default Resource descriptor()
      Returns the static descriptor for this resource.

      The uri value is used by McpDispatcher to route incoming resources/read requests, so each handler in an McpServerConfig must use a unique URI.

      Returns:
      The resource descriptor. Never null.

    • read

      ReadResourceResult read(String uri, BeanStore ctx)
      Reads the resource body.
      Parameters:
      uri - The URI from the resources/read request (matches descriptor().uri).
      ctx - Per-request bean store. Never null.
      Returns:
      The resource contents. Never null.
